events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Brian May Birthday Tribute
angles.copy: Rock legend Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday this Sunday! We're cranking up the Queen all day to celebrate the Red Special maestro.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Mick Jagger Birthday Bash
angles.copy: Still got the moves! Sir Mick Jagger is 83 this Friday. Join us for a day of Stones classics to celebrate the ultimate rock 'n' roll frontman.

events.title: MTV Launched (1981)
events.blurb: On August 1, 1981, MTV launched with its first video, The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

angles.name: MTV Launch Anniversary
angles.copy: Before YouTube, there was MTV. Forty-five years ago, the music channel launched, forever changing how we consume music. What was your favourite music video from back in the day?

events.title: Oasis 'Definitely Maybe' Anniversary
events.blurb: Oasis's seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' was released on August 29, 1994, featuring classics like 'Supersonic' and 'Live Forever'.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Rewind
angles.copy: Rewind to '94! Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' on this day, kicking off a Britpop revolution. What's your go-to track from that iconic album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival Anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Woodstock Flashback
angles.copy: Imagine being at Woodstock '69! This week marks the anniversary of the legendary festival that defined a generation. What artist would you have loved to see live?

events.title: Elvis Presley's Death Anniversary
events.blurb: We remember the 'King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, who passed away on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Forty-nine years ago, the music world lost a legend. Today, we're paying tribute to Elvis Presley and his timeless legacy. Tune in for the King's greatest hits.

events.title: Jimi Hendrix's Death Anniversary
events.blurb: We remember guitar icon Jimi Hendrix, who tragically passed away on September 18, 1970.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix. His music continues to inspire generations. What's your favourite Hendrix track?

events.title: The Beatles 'Abbey Road' Anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic 'Abbey Road' album in the UK on September 26, 1969, featuring the famous zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Abbey Road Flashback
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most famous in history. What's your favourite track from it?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday Rock
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the one and only Chrissie Hynde! Still rocking and inspiring. What's your favourite Pretenders anthem?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman Liam Gallagher turns 54 today.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Our Kid is 54! Happy birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. We're celebrating with a day of his unmistakable vocals and classic tunes.

events.title: Release of John Lennon's 'Imagine'
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in the US on October 11, 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary Reflection
angles.copy: Fifty-five years ago, John Lennon asked us to 'Imagine'. His message of peace and unity resonates as strongly today. What does this song mean to you?

events.title: First iPod Unveiled (2001)
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music with "1,000 songs in your pocket."

angles.name: iPod Revolution Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? Twenty-five years ago, Apple introduced the device that changed how we listen to music forever. How many songs did you cram onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the release of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: James Bond Day Celebration
angles.copy: Shaken, not stirred! It's James Bond Day. Who's your favourite 007 and what's the best Bond theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: John Lennon, co-founder of The Beatles and an iconic solo artist, would have been 86 today.

angles.name: John Lennon Birthday Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message of peace live on. What's your favourite Lennon lyric?

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: Legendary comedian and actor John Cleese, known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, turns 87.

angles.name: John Cleese Birthday Laughs
angles.copy: And now for something completely different... Happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! What's your favourite Python sketch or Fawlty Towers moment?

events.title: The Beatles 'The White Album' Anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles' self-titled double album, famously known as 'The White Album', was released on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: White Album Flashback
angles.copy: Fifty-eight years since The Beatles' 'White Album' dropped! A sprawling masterpiece that showed their incredible range. Which track is your hidden gem?
